{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Damascan Calendar (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The current year is the [[358th Year of the Damascan Calendar]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
